creator: andrews@TECHNOLOGIST.COM
text:
On 17-Aug-99 Will Andrews wrote:
> Finally, an update to the stable version of Zsh, from 3.0.5 to 3.0.6.
> This update includes the removal of the main site and the addition of
> another (ftp.sterling.com -> uiarchive.uiuc.edu).

I forgot to mention, this update fixes the zshall(1) Zsh meta manpage problem
reported in ports/7932.

I assume this was fixed internally.. (i.e., within the Zsh distribution itself.)

--
Will Andrews <andrews@technologist.com>
